Foody

Discover restaurants from food videos.

Watch a food video, find the restaurant, get there — all in seconds.

🍜☕🍕🍣🌮🥗
Open App

How it works

🎬

From video to table

Paste any food video URL and Foody identifies the restaurant instantly.

📍

Find it near you

See restaurants on a live map, sorted by distance from where you are.

🔖

Save your cravings

Bookmark restaurants and come back when the hunger hits.

🌆

Explore the city

Browse nearby spots by cuisine, vibe, and what people are filming.

Ready to find your next favourite spot?

Install Foody and turn every food video into a real dining experience.

Get Started
